summary: Plan-only classification for five hydrated open PR candidates. PR #92584 is routed to central security because it concerns token/query-string handling. No merge is recommended because no candidate has complete merge preflight with a clean Codex /review. One non-security PR has a concrete repair path; the remaining PRs need maintainer review or author-follow-up decisions.

actions.reason: Ready-looking test PR, but merge cannot be planned without maintainer review and complete merge preflight.

Useful contributor PR with actionable review blockers and failing checks; repair the branch before any merge consideration.
